clientConfigFields.label: Base URL
clientConfigFields.description: The Workday tenant base URL used for OAuth and API requests, for example https://wd5-impl-services1.workday.com.

clientConfigFields.label: Tenant
clientConfigFields.description: The Workday tenant path segment used in OAuth and REST API URLs, for example your_tenant.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Retrieve the current authenticated worker profile from Workday.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

anyOf.description: The Workday identifier of the worker.

The human-readable descriptor of the worker type.

actions.name: list_job_postings
actions.description: List job postings from Workday Recruiting with optional filters.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return. Workday accepts values from 1 to 100.

offset.description: The zero-based record offset used for pagination.

jobSiteIds.description: Filter postings by Workday job site identifiers.

categoryIds.description: Filter postings by Workday category identifiers.

jobPostingIds.description: Filter postings by Workday job posting identifiers.

jobRequisitionIds.description: Filter postings by Workday job requisition identifiers.

inputSchema.description: Filter and pagination input for listing job postings.

actions.name: list_workers
actions.description: List workers from Workday Staffing with optional search and termination filters.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return. Workday accepts values from 1 to 100.

offset.description: The zero-based record offset used for pagination.

search.description: A case-insensitive worker search string accepted by Workday.

includeTerminatedWorkers.description: Whether terminated workers should be included in the result.

inputSchema.description: Filter and pagination input for listing workers.
